# module: user_management.py
# Violation: a single module owning the entire vertical slice of parsing, logic, DB, and UI
import json

def handle_user_request(request_body):
    data = json.loads(request_body)
    if not data.get("name"):
        raise ValueError()
        
    db.execute("INSERT INTO users...", data["name"])
    return f"<html>User {data['name']} saved</html>"
